issue: E2E test silently passes with zero scenarios — cli-codex has no fixtures directory so loadFixtures returns [], but test only checks report mode/schema, not scenario count
fix: Assert report.scenarioRows.length > 0, or use a skill with real fixtures (e.g. deep-improvement itself)

issue: prompt passed as argv to python3 subprocess — spawnSync without shell:true prevents OS injection, but prompt reaches skill_advisor.py as sys.argv[1]; transitive import surface (_RUNTIME_SPEC.exec_module) is not verified clean for dynamic eval/exec on argv
fix: Pass prompt over stdin (input:) or env var to sever the argv data path

issue: No test lints the deep-improvement skill's own fixture prompt against its own router-built bannedVocab — deep-improvement SKILL.md router keywords (deep-improvement, bounded agent improvement, 5-dimension scoring) should be verified absent from agent-improve-001.public.json
fix: Add test that builds bannedVocab from deep-improvement router and asserts lintFixture passes on its own fixture prompt

issue: E2E test creates temp dir (mkdtempSync lc-e2e-) but never cleans it up — resource leak in test hygiene
fix: Add afterAll cleanup: try { rmSync(out, { recursive: true }) } catch {}

issue: AMBIGUITY_DELTA=1 boundary (score diff exactly 1, delta=0, empty scores) is not exercised by any test — selectIntents edge cases are uncovered
fix: Add test cases for equal scores (delta=0), score gap >1 (only top kept), and zero intents

issue: Negative-activation scoring (expected.negativeActivation=true) is only tested with a hand-constructed routerResult; no fixture pair or integration test exercises a real negative-activation scenario end-to-end
fix: Author a negative-activation fixture pair or add run-skill-benchmark-level test verifying dims.d3.score===0 for negative scenarios
